response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX embedded systems, no evidence of Linux kernel modification, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack software development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Deep familiarity with Linux, networking protocols, and system-level programming
concerns: No proven C programming experience in embedded or UNIX firmware contexts
Zero indication of Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement
No experience with LAN-switch security features, chip SDKs, or embedded hardware control
